params.name: Watt Steam Engine
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
params.description:
On Dec 15, 1776 AD, Watt improved and made the first usable steam engine.

After over ten years of hard work, Watt invented the steam engine. Five years later, he converted the linear movement of the steam engine into circular motion, making it the engine most widely used in industry.

[Brief History of Steam Engines]

In the mid-18th century, the early industrial steam engine was invented. In the early 19th century, the first steam engine ship was successfully tested. In the middle of the 19th  …
